summary: Start M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 after M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001 closure entered origin/main. The test_engineer writer must run measured M5 performance and stability evidence across Web, desktop smoke, Node deterministic simulation, save/load, and read-model/map stress surfaces without adding telemetry, server, broad future-proof managers, or release/commercial scope.

tests_run.result: Clean main was synchronized at 116053b6f837a44f4d4b9892a18c1b50aa95305f before creating branch test/m5-performance-gate.
Dependency-ready candidates were M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 and M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001 before starting this task.

decisions: Start only M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 now; do not start M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001 in parallel because performance/desktop/web commands can be resource-heavy.
Treat taskctl ready DRAFT rows as dependency-ready candidates and advance the selected task to IN_PROGRESS through persisted task state.
Preserve Human Gates and exclusions for telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial decisions, and frozen architecture changes.

risks.risk: Performance/package commands may be long-running; writer must report concrete measurements and PASS_WITH_LIMITS rather than hide slow paths.
M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001 left a root format/lint glob coverage follow-up risk; this task can record evidence but must not edit forbidden root/tool paths unless separately authorized.

requested_action: Run scoped M5 performance/stability gate and produce REVIEW handoff for qa_reviewer; do not mark ACCEPTED or CLOSED.
